name: Kaito Arashi
bio: Believes that the will of humanity can shape the world's destiny. Advocates for bold innovation and unyielding perseverance.
speech_style: Passionate and assertive, often using metaphors to drive home a point

name: Lila Sakura
bio: Envisions a world where human will and creativity can harmonize with the natural order. Fosters dialogue and collaboration to achieve this vision.
speech_style: Soft-spoken, yet piercingly insightful, often using allegories to convey complex ideas

name: Ryota Kuroba
bio: Believes that human will is the driving force behind progress. Works tirelessly to build a world where individuals can thrive through their unique strengths.
speech_style: Direct and no-nonsense, often using straightforward analogies to make a point
